summary: PR 2441 decompiled and marked `melee/gr/grfigureget.c` as matching, adding implementations for `grFigureGet_802196F0` and `grFigureGet_80219898`, closing `grFigureGet_80219B10`, tightening `grFigureGet_GroundVars` field types, and adjusting split/symbol metadata for grfigureget-related rodata, sdata2, sbss, and local symbol scope.

key_files.role: Main decompilation target; added missing grfigureget function bodies, local data type, zero Vec3 constant, includes, and typed externs.
Updated `grFigureGet_GroundVars` from unknown/scalar slots into typed counters and arrays used by the new grfigureget implementations.
Changed build classification for `melee/gr/grfigureget.c` from `NonMatching` to `Matching`.
Adjusted function scopes and data symbol metadata for grfigureget rodata/sdata2/data labels.
Moved grfigureget sbss ownership out of the grfigureget split and adjusted adjacent grpushon sbss range and grfigureget sdata2 range.

what_changed.text: `grFigureGet_802196F0` was implemented, including animation setup, callback clearing, toy/figure selection logic, three-slot initialization, `PAD_STACK(8)`, typed access to `grFigureGet_804D6AC0`, memzero of three arrays, and `mpJointSetCb1` registration.
`grFigureGet_80219898` was implemented, including fighter iteration, item spawning/positioning, timer/counter updates, stage flag updates, and `lb_800115F4()` call.

`grFigureGet_80219B10` was adjusted from near-match to full match by changing the flag access shape through an `ECBFlagStruct* tmp`, comparing classifier to `0x6`, and replacing inline `4.5f`/`-4.5f` bounds with extern sdata2 floats `grFigureGet_804DBB60` and `grFigureGet_804DBB64`.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] report: grFigureGet_80219B10 +3 bytes, 99.18% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: `grFigureGet_GroundVars` changed `x0` and `x4` from `UNK_T` to `s32`, converted `x10/x14/x18` into `int x10[3]`, retained `x1C[3]` and `x28[3]`, and added `Item_GObj* x34[3]`.

Symbol metadata made `grFigureGet_OnTouchLine` and `grFigureGet_OnCheckShadowRender` local, shrank `grFigureGet_803B8470` from size 0x10 to 0xC, added local label `...data.0`, and converted several grfigureget sdata2 floats/double from global address-style names to local `@` labels.
Split metadata extended grpushon `.sbss` to 0x804D6AC8, removed grfigureget `.sbss`, and shortened grfigureget `.sdata2` to end at 0x804DBB60.

smart_moves.text: Typed the grfigureget ground-vars layout enough to express repeated three-slot state as arrays instead of leaving scalar unknown fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gr/grfigureget.c uses gp->gv.figureget.x10[], x1C[], x28[], x34[]

smart_moves.text: Used explicit split and symbol metadata edits alongside the code match, including local data labels and scope changes, rather than leaving data ownership implicit.
Kept a zero vector as a typed `static Vec3 const` and adjusted the matching rodata symbol size from 0x10 to 0xC, aligning the source-level constant shape with a Vec3-sized object.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gr/grfigureget.c static Vec3 const grFigureGet_803B8470

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering a stage GroundVars struct, contiguous scalar unknowns may become fixed-size arrays once function bodies show repeated indexed slots; update the shared type so the implementation can use typed array access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grFigureGet_GroundVars converts x10/x14/x18 into x10[3]
raw_diff: grFigureGet_802196F0 and grFigureGet_80219898 index x10/x1C/x28/x34

decomp_lessons.lesson: Function matching in a stage TU may require coordinated section metadata updates for rodata/sdata2/sbss ownership and symbol scope, not only C body changes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: splits.txt grpushon/grfigureget sbss and sdata2 changes
text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] report includes .sdata2 and .rodata new matches

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small near-match cleanups can depend on exact access shape and literal/data ownership: `grFigureGet_80219B10` reached 100% with an explicit temporary for `cd->x34_flags`, numeric classifier comparison, and extern float bounds.

naming_conventions.text: This PR kept many address-style names for unresolved grfigureget functions and data (`grFigureGet_802196F0`, `grFigureGet_804D6AC0`, `grFigureGet_804DBB60`) while using local role names such as `gp`, `ip`, `item_gobj`, and `pos` where roles were evident.
Local section labels in symbols metadata used compiler-style local names such as `@215` and `...data.0` rather than inventing semantic global names for floats/data without stronger evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Inserted `PAD_STACK(8)` in `grFigureGet_802196F0` after the three-slot loop and before reading `grFigureGet_804D6AC0`; the bot report shows the function moved from 0% to 100%, but the PR does not include reviewer discussion explaining why the pad was necessary.
Used local temporary and declaration/order-sensitive shapes in `grFigureGet_80219B10` (`ECBFlagStruct* tmp`, assignment inside dereference expression) to close the remaining small mismatch.
Represented the zero position initializer as `pos = grFigureGet_803B8470` with a `static Vec3 const` rodata object, matching `.rodata` according to the bot report.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/gr/grfigureget.c static Vec3 const and pos assignment

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed grfigureget sdata2 symbol ownership/naming to local labels and left two boundary floats as extern globals used in code; bot report shows grfigureget `.sdata2` became 100%.

review_feedback.text: No human review comments were present in the loaded PR slice.
Automated report credited 5 new matches: `grFigureGet_80219898`, `grFigureGet_802196F0`, grfigureget `.sdata2`, grfigureget `.rodata`, and `grFigureGet_80219B10`.

Automated report also recorded one unmatched-item regression: `main/melee/gr/grpushon` `.sbss` went from 50.00% to 25.00%. The slice does not include follow-up discussion explaining whether this was accepted as a metadata tradeoff.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR metadata and changed files
text_corpus: bot report with match/regression details
notes: The loaded diff and bot report strongly support what changed and which functions/data items matched.

The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so reviewer intent and rationale for tactics such as `PAD_STACK(8)`, exact declaration shapes, and the grpushon `.sbss` regression are not evidenced.
The automated report shows a grpushon `.sbss` regression in an unmatched item; the slice does not show whether this was investigated or accepted.
No local build logs beyond the decomp-dev bot report are present in the loaded evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover GroundVars arrays when repeated indexed state becomes evident
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2441 shows `grFigureGet_GroundVars` changing unknown/scalar slots into typed arrays (`x10[3]`, `x1C[3]`, `x28[3]`, `x34[3]`) as the recovered functions index three repeated state slots.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Treat section metadata changes as part of a TU match, but track adjacent regressions
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2441 paired grfigureget C matches with symbols/splits changes that matched grfigureget rodata and sdata2, while the bot report also flagged a grpushon `.sbss` regression from the adjacent split adjustment.

source_update_candidates.title: grfigureget.c reached Matching in PR 2441
source_update_candidates.text: `configure.py` changed `melee/gr/grfigureget.c` from `Object(NonMatching, ...)` to `Object(Matching, ...)`, and the bot report listed new matches for two functions plus grfigureget rodata/sdata2 and `grFigureGet_80219B10`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-level status fact, but should be curated against current source state before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: grfigureget split metadata removed sbss and shortened sdata2 in PR 2441
source_update_candidates.text: The grfigureget split changed from having `.sbss start:0x804D6AC0 end:0x804D6AC8` and `.sdata2 end:0x804DBB68` to no grfigureget `.sbss` entry and `.sdata2 end:0x804DBB60`; grpushon `.sbss` was extended to end at 0x804D6AC8.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially important split ownership fact, but the adjacent grpushon regression means it should be verified against current splits and reports.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK in matched functions should carry explicit evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2441 used `PAD_STACK(8)` inside a function reported as newly matched. The slice supports the tactic's presence and match result, but not the rationale; this reinforces the existing requirement that stack padding tactics need narrow objdiff/build evidence and reviewable justification.
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate reinforcement of existing `matching-tactics-need-evidence`; not a new accepted standard because the PR lacks human discussion.

rejection_notes.text: Do not infer that the grpushon `.sbss` regression was intentionally accepted; the loaded slice only shows the bot warning and merge metadata, with no review explanation.
Do not promote the local variable names in the new functions as canonical semantic names; many are still temp/register-shaped (`temp_r3`, `var_r30`, `var_r29_3`) and appear matching-oriented.
Do not generalize the `classifier == 0x6` replacement over `HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_ITEM` as a style rule; the PR evidence only shows this exact change in `grFigureGet_80219B10`.
